---
title: "The Prophet Daniel Explained, in a Series of Readings for Young Persons"
---

## The Prophet Daniel Explained, in a Series of Readings for Young Persons

**Author:** Margaret Blackstone
**Date:** 1873-1874
**Imprint:** London: Mozley

### Notes

This originally appeared in the <i>Monthly Paper of Sunday Teaching</i>.  It was a translation of François Samuel Louis Gaussen, <i>Daniel le prophète, exposé dans une suite de leçons</i> 2 vols (Paris: Librairie protestante 1848-1850).

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
